Ad image copy prompt

Paste this into ChatGPT or any AI image chat. It writes ad copy to the Why, What, How formula in your audience's own words, gives you a symptom version and a benefit version, counts the characters, and waits for your approval before it generates anything. Judge the copy first; generate second.
